zh.lifeSummary: 當MAUDE MIDDLETON於1396年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾米德萊頓時，她的父親SIR JOHN MIDDLETON16歲，母親Lady Alice Mauleverer14歲。她於1415年之前與JOHN DE BARTON II在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1450年在英國藍卡爾米德萊頓享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当MAUDE MIDDLETON于1396年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾米德萊頓时，她的父亲SIR JOHN MIDDLETON16岁，母亲Lady Alice Mauleverer14岁。她于1415年之前与JOHN DE BARTON II在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1450年在英国藍卡爾米德萊頓享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: MIDDLETON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places so called. In over thirty instances from many different areas, the name is from Old English midel ‘middle’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. However, Middleton on the Hill near Leominster in Herefordshire appears in Domesday Book as Miceltune, the first element clearly being Old English micel ‘large’, ‘great’ (see Middlebrook ). Middleton Baggot and Middleton Priors in Shropshire have early spellings that suggest gem̄thhyll (from gem̄th ‘confluence’ + hyll ‘hill’) + tūn as the origin. This surname is also found in Scotland and Ireland.

History: A Scottish family of this name derives it from lands at Middleto(u)n near Kincardine. The Scottish physician Peter Middleton practiced in New York City after 1752 and was one of the founders of the medical school at King's College (now Columbia University) in 1767. One of the earliest of the Charleston, SC, Middleton family of prominent legislators was Arthur Middleton, born in Charleston in 1681. The name has also been established in Ireland since at least the 13th century; its presence was reinforced by settlers in the 17th century.

variants.name: Midthun
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of about ten farmsteads in western Norway named Midtun, from Old Norse mith ‘middle’ + tún ‘enclosure, farmstead’. Compare Middleton .

variants.name: Melton
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from any of various places, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, and Yorkshire, all of which have the same origin as Middleton , with Old English middel replaced by its Old Norse equivalent methal after the Scandinavian settlement of northern and eastern England.

variants.name: Middlebrook
meanings: English: habitational name from a lost Micklebrook in Blackburn (Lancashire), recorded as Mikelbroc in the 13th century. The placename appears to derive from Old English micel ‘big’ + brōc ‘brook, stream’. The surname has undergone a dissimilatory or folk-etymological change from Mickle- to Middle-.

variants.name: Milton
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from one or other of the many places called Milton, or sometimes Middleton (see Middleton ) and occasionally Melton (see Melton ), most of which derive from Old English middel ‘middle’ or myln ‘mill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: MAUDE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Maud  , the usual spelling of the name in North America.

en.lifeSummary: When MAUDE MIDDLETON was born in 1396, in Middleton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, SIR JOHN MIDDLETON, was 16 and her mother, Lady Alice Mauleverer, was 14. She married JOHN DE BARTON II before 1415, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1450, in Middleton, Lancashire, England, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque MAUDE MIDDLETON est née en 1396, à Middleton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, SIR JOHN MIDDLETON, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Mauleverer, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé JOHN DE BARTON II avant 1415, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1450, à Middleton, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als MAUDE MIDDLETON 1396 in Middleton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater SIR JOHN MIDDLETON 16 und ihre Mutter Lady Alice Mauleverer 14. Sie hat vor 1415 in England JOHN DE BARTON II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1450 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Middleton, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando MAUDE MIDDLETON è nata il nel 1396 nel Middleton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, SIR JOHN MIDDLETON, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Lady Alice Mauleverer, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato JOHN DE BARTON II prima del 1415, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1450, nel Middleton, Lancashire, England, all'età di 54 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: MAUDE MIDDLETON(이)가 1396년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 미들레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 SIR JOHN MIDDLETON(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alice Mauleverer(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1415년 이전 영국에서 JOHN DE BARTON II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1450년 영국 랭카실르 미들레턴에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда MAUDE MIDDLETON родилась в 1396 г. в местности миддлетон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени SIR JOHN MIDDLETON было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Mauleverer, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени JOHN DE BARTON II перед 1415 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1450 г. в местности миддлетон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 54 лет.
